query:
SELECT
            o.id,
            o.user_id,
            o.status as "status: OrderStatus",
            o.total,
            o.created_at,
            COALESCE(
                (SELECT jsonb_agg(item_data)
                 FROM (
                    SELECT
                        oi.id,
                        oi.product_id,
                        p.name as product_name,
                        oi.quantity,
                        oi.price_at_time
                    FROM order_items oi
                    JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id
                    WHERE oi.order_id = o.id
                 ) item_data
                ), '[]'::jsonb
            ) as "items!"
        FROM orders o
        JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
        WHERE u.email = $1
          AND o.id < $2
        ORDER BY o.id DESC
        LIMIT $3
